title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: libnftnl bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for libnftnl is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The libnftnl packages provide a library for low-level interaction with nftables Netlink's API over libmnl.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): udata: Introduce NFTNL_UDATA_TABLE_NFT{VER,BLD} (JIRA:RHEL-113823)

Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64

full_text:
An update for libnftnl is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The libnftnl packages provide a library for low-level interaction with nftables Netlink's API over libmnl.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): udata: Introduce NFTNL_UDATA_TABLE_NFT{VER,BLD} (JIRA:RHEL-113823)
